name: lakshx-trace
description: Agent trace/observability inspector — per-turn timing, token spend, and an expandable tool-call trace for the LakshX agent's OWN behavior. Not a database tool; see lakshx-db for that. Reads ~/.lakshx/traces/ (written by the agent's always-on local trace recorder, agent/src/trace-store.ts) directly, with no dependency on Langfuse or a live agent process.
